context_note: Belgium vs Iran, WC2026 Group Stage. Belgium 69.45% to win; Iran 10.87%. Draw 20.01% — no RULE8 fire (<25%). Belgium NOT extreme favorite — no RULE7 (<86%). Iran 10.87% = underdog range (10-30%) → RULE15 applies to Taremi. Prior match data: BEL 1-1 EGY (Belgium 15 fouls, 3 SOT, 2 corners; Egypt 15 fouls, 3 SOT, 7 corners). IRN 2-2 NZL (Iran 10 fouls, 4 SOT, 4 corners; NZL 8 fouls, 8 SOT, 1 corner). Belgium pressing team (15 fouls vs Egypt despite 53.6% possession). Spain vs KSA context: dominant possession team (67%) only committed 10 fouls. Belgium may be ~13 fouls (possession style but physical). Iran deeper defender → 12-15 fouls.

OU85_total_SOT.note: Thin — individual BEL/IRN SOT markets returned identical prices; use player-derived lambdas as primary

Mehdi_Taremi.note: offer-only, illiquid — key reference for Q9

rules_applied.NO_RULE8: Draw 20.01% < 25% threshold. Not a high-draw match.
rules_applied.RULE15_Taremi: Iran 10.87% win prob = underdog range (10-30%). RULE15 applies to Taremi G or A (Q9). Market offer 0.25 — likely overpriced. Shade toward 0.22-0.28.
rules_applied.Q1_Iran_fouls: Iran defensive underdog vs Belgium high-presser. BEL 15 fouls vs EGY; IRN 10 fouls vs NZL. LOW CONFIDENCE — 1 match each. Skellam λ_BEL=13, λ_IRN=14 → 0.54 but highly uncertain. Genuine coin-flip. Crowd likely ~0.48-0.55 (underdog fouls more narrative). No strong edge. Estimate 0.45.
rules_applied.Q2_2H_cards: λ_total_cards=3.2 (from OU2.5=61.75%). Assuming 47% of cards in 2H (Iran frustration as game progresses). λ_2H=1.50 → P(2H≥2)=0.44. Crowd likely similar. No large edge.
rules_applied.Q3_BTTS_3plus: Direct Smarkets market: BTTS+OU2.5 Yes/Over=0.3665. Trust market. BTTS=P(BEL≥1)×P(IRN≥1)=0.885×0.524=0.464, consistent with Yes/Under+Yes/Over=0.461.
rules_applied.Q4_BEL_more_2H_SOT: Belgium is the dominant team attacking throughout. λ_BEL_SOT_2H=2.96 vs λ_IRN_SOT_2H=1.25. Skellam z=-0.72 → P=0.72. Strong YES. Crowd likely 0.55-0.65.
rules_applied.Q5_4plus_2H_SOT: λ_total_SOT_2H=4.21 (midpoint from player-derived 3.90 and market-thin 4.50). P(≥4)=0.61. Crowd likely 0.50-0.60. Slight YES lean.
rules_applied.Q6_Belgium_wins: FTR Belgium=0.6945. Direct market. No RULE7 applies. Estimate 0.70.
rules_applied.Q7_Belgium_HT_winning: HT market Belgium=0.5182. Direct market. Estimate 0.52.
rules_applied.Q8_Tielemans_SOT: Liquid Smarkets market: Tielemans bid=0.3788, offer=0.3817, mid=0.3802. Very tight spread = highly liquid. Trust directly. Estimate 0.38. Crowd likely 0.35-0.40.
rules_applied.Q9_Taremi_G_or_A: RULE15 applies: Iran 10.87% underdog. Market offer only at 0.25. Model pre-RULE15: λ_Taremi_goal=0.408 (55% share of λ_IRN=0.742) → P(goal)=0.335 + assists → P(G or A)~0.45. But: Taremi SOT market (44.85%) × team conversion rate (0.742/2.6 SOT = 28.5%) → λ_Taremi_goal=0.595×0.285=0.169 → P(goal)=0.16 → P(G or A)≈0.25-0.28. RULE15 shade from 0.45 → 0.27. Market offer 0.25. Estimate 0.27.
rules_applied.Q10_9plus_corners: Direct Smarkets: OU8.5 Over=0.5769 (liquid). λ_corners≈9.3. Belgium dominant attacking team → many corners. BEL-EGY total=9 corners (BEL 2+EGY 7). Estimate 0.58.

Q1_Iran_more_fouls.note: Coin-flip territory. Belgium pressed Egypt (15 fouls), Iran conservative vs NZL (10 fouls). Skellam with λ_BEL=13, λ_IRN=14 gives 0.54 but high uncertainty. Crowd probably at ~0.48-0.55. No strong edge either direction. Slight discount from 0.50 since Belgium can also foul frequently.

Q2_2plus_cards_2H.note: λ_total_cards=3.2 from OU2.5=61.75%. Assuming 47% of match cards in 2H → λ_2H=1.50 → P(2H≥2)=0.442. Iran frustration in 2H if trailing supports this. Crowd likely 0.42-0.50.

Q3_BTTS_3plus_goals.note: Direct Smarkets BTTS+OU2.5 Yes/Over=0.3665. Trust market. P(BTTS)=0.461 from individual team goal markets is consistent.

Q4_Belgium_more_2H_SOT.note: Skellam: λ_BEL_SOT_2H=2.96 vs λ_IRN_SOT_2H=1.25 → P=0.72. Belgium dominant team with Lukaku (72.73% SOT), KDB (60.98%), Trossard (57.63%). Crowd likely 0.55-0.65. Edge ~+10pp.

Q5_4plus_total_2H_SOT.note: λ_total_SOT_2H=4.21 → P(≥4)=0.61. Total SOT market thin (same price across markets), but player-derived λ=3.9 and market-implied λ=4.5 average to ~4.2. Crowd likely 0.50-0.58.

Q6_Belgium_wins.note: Direct FTR Belgium=0.6945. Trust market. No RULE7 or RULE8 modifications.

Q7_Belgium_HT_winning.note: Direct HT result Belgium=0.5182. Trust market. λ_BEL_1H=0.929, λ_IRN_1H=0.324 → P(BEL wins 1H) consistent with market.

Q8_Tielemans_1plus_SOT.note: LIQUID Smarkets market: bid=0.3788, offer=0.3817, mid=0.3802. Tight spread, trust market. Tielemans (Aston Villa CM) gets into positions to shoot. λ_Tielemans_SOT=0.479 → P(≥1)=0.381 ✓.

Q9_Taremi_goal_or_assist.note: RULE15 applies (Iran 10.87% underdog). Market offer=0.25 (offer-only). Model: Iran λ_goals=0.742, Taremi ~55% of goals → λ_Taremi_goal=0.408 → P(goal)=0.335. But cross-checking via SOT market (Taremi 44.85% SOT) × team conversion → λ_goal≈0.17 → P(G or A)≈0.25-0.28. RULE15 shade → 0.27. Crowd likely 0.30-0.38.

Q10_9plus_corners.note: Direct market: OU8.5 corners Over=0.5769 (liquid). λ_corners≈9.3. BEL-EGY had exactly 9 total corners. Belgium attacks more vs Iran than vs Egypt → Belgium gets more corners, Iran gets fewer. Total ≈ 9.3 expected. Trust market.

match_facts.note: 0-0 draw. Belgium failed to score despite being 69% favorites. Iran defended well. Low corner count despite Belgium's attacking history.

Q1_Iran_more_fouls.notes: Iran committed more fouls than Belgium. Our 45% was on NO side; crowd 58% on YES side — crowd won.

Q2_2plus_cards_2H.notes: Fewer than 2 cards in 2H. Both on YES side but crowd 56% more wrong than our 44%.

Q3_BTTS_3plus_goals.notes: 0-0 draw, no BTTS. Both on NO side; tiny edge.

Q4_Belgium_more_2H_SOT.notes: Belgium had more 2H SOT. Our 72% more extreme than crowd 66% — bigger reward.

Q5_4plus_2H_total_SOT.notes: 4+ 2H SOT: YES. Tiny edge over crowd.

Q6_Belgium_wins.notes: 0-0 draw. Both strongly on YES; our 70% slightly more wrong than crowd 69%.

Q7_Belgium_HT_winning.notes: HT 0-0. Our 52% vs crowd 50%; both wrong but crowd slightly more wrong.

Q8_Tielemans_1plus_SOT.notes: Tielemans DID have a SOT. Crowd 43% was closer to truth than our 38%.

Q9_Taremi_goal_or_assist.notes: Taremi 0 G+A. RULE15 applied correctly (Iran 10.87% underdog). 0-0 = Iran 0 goals.

Q10_9plus_corners.notes: Fewer than 9 corners. Belgium's corner expectation didn't fire in a low-intensity 0-0. Our 58% on wrong YES side.

post_match_results.learning_notes: 0-0 upset (Belgium 69% favorites). Key losses: Q1 Iran fouls (Iran defensive but still fouled) and Q10 corners (0-0 suppressed Belgium attacking). Key wins: Q2 cards 2H (+14.44) and Q4 Belgium more 2H SOT (+5.60). RULE15 Taremi worked (+4.14).
